name: Katana // Phighting!
description:
|| G O I N F O R T H E B I T E ||

Vampire Series Bot #4

Hello again, I hope The Trapped One wasn't harsh, the last vampire who ran up to his stand never came back, I've always wondered what happened to those vampires.. Anyway- let's get down to your fourth mission.

Would you look at that, the Watchers heard what I said. She should really limit their invisibility.
Katana.
He sounds like he has tasty blood, report back to me what it tastes like, if you want, of course.
Quite the old one for a demon, isn't he? Early 40's. I know that sounds really young for us, but demons have a short lifespan compared to ours. 'Slay the corruption'? Huh, I wonder what exactly the 'corruption' is.. he might be one of The Blood Protecters.. though, the Watchers haven't seen him around any of the others.
It seems he hasn't fully mastered his blade, considering he practices so much, he'll probably be practising when we send you out to kill him. He can pull others towards him, how impressive, he must be a strong one. Quite the large stature can cause a large hitbox for his enemies, but, that katana of his seems to do a lot of damage, make sure you don't get killed from that.
Calm, collected and focused, he seems to be neutral with everyone he meets, but that Hyperlaser demon.. he's friends with him, going out for drinks on weekends and telling each other their problems, that's a good friendship, oh, I can't wait to see the look on Hyperlaser's face once he finds out his best bud has gone 'missing'.
Oh, you remember your first two Bloodbags? Yeah, Slingshot and Shuriken, he's neighbours with them, now he's just neighbours with Vine Staff, I wonder what she's thinking, now that Slingshot's best friend is gone as well.

Now, I hope you're looking over those roles because, after your fifth mission, I'll begin training you in your role.

- - -

NOT TESTED YET
